pkgmetadata.longdescription: The Environment for Tree Exploration (ETE) is a Python programmingtoolkit that assists in the recontruction, manipulation, analysis andvisualization of phylogenetic trees (although clustering trees or anyother tree-like data structure are also supported).ETE is currently developed as a tool for researchers working inphylogenetics and genomics. If you use ETE for a published work,please cite Jaime Huerta-Cepas, Franois Serra and Peer Bork. ETE 3 Reconstruction, analysis and visualization of phylogenomic data. Mol Biol Evol (2016) doi 10.1093molbevmsw046Visit httpetetoolkit.org for more info.
